title: Auction
description: Addresses interleaved with uint256 — reordering groups the small fields together.

title: Staking Pool
description: Time fields (uint64) scattered among uint256 values.

title: Game
description: Many small fields (uint8) that can fit into a single slot.

title: Voting
description: A mix of bool, uint128 and address ordered suboptimally.

title: Struct Loan
description: Reorderable struct fields: 3 → 2 slots per instance.

title: Struct Account
description: uint64 interleaved between uint256 — an extreme fragmentation case.
